zh.lifeSummary: 當TUDOR FYCHAN ap GRONOWY於1314年出生在英國威爾斯梅利奧爾利阿格瑞培尼亞特時，他的父親Earl Gronwy ap Tudor Hen39歲，母親GWERVIL verch MADOG HENDWR40歲。他於1359年與Margred Marged ferch Thomas在英國威爾斯結婚。他們至少是8個兒子的父母。他去世於1367年9月19日在威爾士凱爾納方史爾班格爾享年53歲，埋葬在威爾士凱爾納方史爾班格爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当TUDOR FYCHAN ap GRONOWY于1314年出生在英国威尔斯梅利奧爾利阿格瑞培尼亞特时，他的父亲Earl Gronwy ap Tudor Hen39岁，母亲GWERVIL verch MADOG HENDWR40岁。他于1359年与Margred Marged ferch Thomas在英国威尔斯结婚。他们至少是8个儿子的父母。他去世于1367年9月19日在威尔士凱爾納方史爾班格爾享年53岁，埋葬在威尔士凱爾納方史爾班格爾。

nameMeanings.name: GRONOWY
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Welsh: relationship name from the Welsh personal name Goronwy (also found as Gronw and Gronow, from Old Welsh Guorgonui).

variants.name: Greeno
meanings: English (London): variant of   Greenough   or   Greenhouse   1.

variants.name: Greenhouse
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh Gronow with English genitival -s, from the Welsh personal name Goronwy (also found as Gronw and Gronow, from Old Welsh Guorgonui).
English: in Lancashire perhaps a variant of Greenhow , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

English: alternatively, a topographic name for someone who lived in a house by a village green, from Middle English grene ‘green’ + hous ‘house’. (The term greenhouse was not used to denote a glasshouse for the cultivation of ‘greens’ or sensitive plants until the late 17th century.)

nameMeanings.name: TUDOR
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from the Old Celtic form Teutorix, composed of elements meaning ‘people, tribe’ and ‘ruler, king’. It has been described as a Welsh form of Theodore, but there is no connection between them, though it is ultimately akin to the Germanic name Theodoric ( see Terry ).

variants.name: Tudor
meanings: Traditional: from the Old Celtic form Teutorix, composed of elements meaning ‘people, tribe’ and ‘ruler, king’. It has been described as a Welsh form of Theodore, but there is no connection between them, though it is ultimately akin to the Germanic name Theodoric ( see Terry ).

variants.name: Tudyr
meanings: Traditional: from the Old Celtic form Teutorix, composed of elements meaning ‘people, tribe’ and ‘ruler, king’. It has been described as a Welsh form of Theodore, but there is no connection between them, though it is ultimately akin to the Germanic name Theodoric ( see Terry ).

nameMeanings.name: FYCHAN
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When TUDOR FYCHAN ap GRONOWY was born in 1314, in Peniarth, Llanegryn, Merionethshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Earl Gronwy ap Tudor Hen, was 39 and his mother, GWERVIL verch MADOG HENDWR, was 40. He married Margred Marged ferch Thomas in 1359, in Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons. He died on 19 September 1367, in Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Wales, at the age of 53, and was buried in Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque TUDOR FYCHAN ap GRONOWY est né en 1314, à Peniarth, Llanegryn, Merionethshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Earl Gronwy ap Tudor Hen, avait 39 ans et sa mère, GWERVIL verch MADOG HENDWR, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Margred Marged ferch Thomas en 1359, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils. Il est décédé le 19 septembre 1367, à Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Galles, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Galles.

de.Peniarth, Llanegryn, Merionethshire, Wal: Peniarth, Llanegryn, Merionethshire, Wales, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als TUDOR FYCHAN ap GRONOWY 1314 in Peniarth, Llanegryn, Merionethshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Earl Gronwy ap Tudor Hen 39 und seine Mutter GWERVIL verch MADOG HENDWR 40. Er hat 1359 in Wales, United Kingdom Margred Marged ferch Thomas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne. Er starb am 19. September 1367 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Wales und wurde in Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando TUDOR FYCHAN ap GRONOWY è nato il nel 1314 nel Peniarth, Llanegryn, Merionethshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Earl Gronwy ap Tudor Hen, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, GWERVIL verch MADOG HENDWR, aveva 40 anni. ja.lifeSummary: TUDOR FYCHAN ap GRONOWYが1314年にイギリスウェールズメリオンエスシュアイアランエグリンペニアルスで生まれた時，父Earl Gronwy ap Tudor Henは39歳，母GWERVIL verch MADOG HENDWRは40歳であった。1359年にイギリスウェールズでMargred Marged ferch Thomasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子の親であった。彼は1367年9月19日にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアバンゴルで53歳で死去し，ウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアバンゴルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: TUDOR FYCHAN ap GRONOWY(이)가 1314년 영국 웨일스 머이오네스실르 랜그린 펜이아르스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Earl Gronwy ap Tudor Hen(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 GWERVIL verch MADOG HENDWR(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1359년 영국 웨일스에서 Margred Marged ferch Thomas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1367년 9월 19일 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 방어에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 방어에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда TUDOR FYCHAN ap GRONOWY родился в 1314 г. в местности пенярт, лланегрин, мириоунетшир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Earl Gronwy ap Tudor Hen было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали GWERVIL verch MADOG HENDWR, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Margred Marged ferch Thomas в 1359 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей. Он умер 19 сентября 1367 г. в местности бангор, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности бангор, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando TUDOR FYCHAN ap GRONOWY nació en 1314, en Peniarth, Llanegryn, Merionethshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Earl Gronwy ap Tudor Hen, tenía 39 años y su mamá, GWERVIL verch MADOG HENDWR, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Margred Marged ferch Thomas en 1359, en Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos. Murió el 19 de septiembre de 1367, en Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Gales, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Bangor, Caernarfonshire, Gales.
